mechanism: Working capital absorption inflates revenue and EBITDA while compressing cash flow, causing Merton model inputs (equity volatility, distance-to-default) to understate true credit risk. This mechanical divergence between equity-implied and actual credit risk widens the credit-equity basis.
regime_dependence: Widest when commodity passthrough is high in revenue terms but low in cash flow terms (OCF/revenue ratio < 0.5x)
